《願榮光歸香港》
Glory be to thee, Hong Kong

何以 這土地 淚再流
In angst, tears are shed o’er this Land
何以 令眾人 亦憤恨
With rage, fears are crushed, in arms we stand
昂首 拒默沉 吶喊聲 響透
We rise, undefiled, our voice shall never die
盼自由 歸於 這裡
As we yearn, our freedom nighs

何以 這恐懼 抹不走
With eyes blinded, long it comes the night
何以 為信念 從沒退後
In faith, banners high, we pledge to fight
何解 血在流 但邁進聲 響透
Our flesh, sacrificed, our blood shall write this song
建自由 光輝 香港
Free this Land, “Stand with Hong Kong!”

在 晚星 墜落 徬徨 午夜
Stars will fall, and darkness fills the air
迷霧裡 最遠處 吹 來 號 角 聲
Storms will break, bedazzled by our gallant flares!
捍自由
We shall strike
來齊集這裡
This perilous night
來全力抗對
Determined to fight
勇氣 智慧 也 永不滅
With hope, with song, with dignity!

黎明來到 要光復 這香港
Glory enshrined, break our chains! Hold our lines!
同行兒女 為正義 時代革命
Freedom shall rise! Revolution of our Time!
祈求 民主 與自由 萬世都 不朽
Liberty thrives, rights divine, in our unending strides
我願 榮光 歸香港
Glory be to thee, Hong Kong!

replies.msg:
香港作為國際大都會，華洋精英薈萃，一來都係我城引以為傲嘅一樣野。

雖然香港九成人口為華人，但係都唔可以忘記我地仲有好多唔同種族嘅真香港人。

香港法定語言亦都係中文+英文雙語；批評之前亦都可以留意下其他國家嘅國歌，例如好出名嘅加拿大國歌 O Canada（法：Ô Canada），亦都係有英文版同埋法文版，就係因為國家尊重法文呢一個語言。

with dignity > we fight till end

多謝一眾巴打欣賞
既然有知音人 我想分享下
最重要係，所有英文字嘅輕重音要同拍字嘅長短度夾
短音用 preposition，長音用實字，所以可以做到鏗鏘有聲
盡量希望做到意譯，唔想冇咗原詞嘅意思

In angst, tears are shed o’er this Land
With rage, fears are crushed, in arms we stand
We rise, undefiled, our voice shall never die
As we yearn, our freedom nighs

註：
(1) "Land", "Stand" / "Die", "Nighs" 中 rhyme
(2) "Tears are shed", "Fears are crushed" 互相呼應，一個負面、一個正面

With eyes blinded, long it comes the night
In faith, banners high, we pledge to fight
Our flesh, sacrificed, our blood shall write this song
Free this Land, “Stand with Hong Kong!”

註：
(1) First stanza "In angst" + "With rage", second stanza 特登將兩個preposition調轉 "With eyes" + "In faith"
(2) "Night", "Fight" / "Song", "Kong" 中 rhyme
(3) "Stand with Hong Kong, Fight for Freedom" 為示威者常用英文口號

Stars will fall, and darkness fills the air
Storms will break, bedazzled by our gallant flares!
We shall strike This perilous night Determined to fight
With hope, with song, with dignity!

註：
(1) Stars will fall + Storms will break 互相呼應，一個負面、一個正面
(2) "Air", "Flares" 中 rhyme
(3) "Strike", "Night", "Fight" 中 rhyme
(4) 全部輕重音中哂，短音用preposition，長音用實字，所以鏗鏘有聲
(5) 最後一句差兩個syllables就係 Shakespeare 最鍾意嘅 iambic pentameter，填詞一輕一重就會好有rhythm

Glory enshrined, break our chains! Hold our lines!
Freedom shall rise! Revolution of our Time!
Liberty thrives, rights divine, in our unending strides
Glory be to thee, Hong Kong!

註：
(1) 如樓上巴打講，"enshrined", "lines", "rise", "Time", "thrives", "divine", "strides" ，我係刻意全部 rhyme 哂，亦都係刻意加強 rhyme 嘅次數（老實說，要rhyme哂成首歌都得，但係chorus就唔會覺得特別鏗鏘有聲，冇咗個起承轉合）
(2) 時代革命 "Revolution of our time" 係點都要譯到，otherwise 成首歌冇咗靈魂
(3) "Glory" 一定要擺頭，拉丁文彌撒 / 傳統聖詩 / 神劇 多數都以 "Gloria" 開始，最容易唱 （e.g. Gloria patri, Gloria in excelsis Deo）

replies.msg:
其實《願榮光歸香港》個曲式係好似 Star Spangled Banner
大概都係 AABA'
"O'er" 就英國人美國人都應該係咁用

如果純粹研究英文/音樂，好多國歌都離不開嗰幾隻字

"Glorious"、 "Freedom" 呢啲字 "O Canada!" （法：Ô Canada!）都有；"ramparts"、"faith"呢啲字，"God Defend New Zealand"又有；"bloody flags"、"chains"呢啲用詞 "La Marseillaise"（法國國歌英文版）又有

用英文唱嘅國歌reference唔多（雖然應該已經係最多），同埋都要尊重原本廣東話歌詞（原詞有強烈革命色彩），所以都有唔少制肘

當然，我自己係覺得 Defence of Fort M'Henry 真係寫得超好!!!! "And the rocket's red glare, The bombs bursting in air, Gave proof through the night, That our flag was still there." - 係神英文。

同埋加上以革命去立國再採納嘅國歌（仲要用英文唱），其實唔太多reference point；Star Spangled Banner 真係表表者。所以在上述制肘下，我相信有少少美國國歌feel都在所難免~

quote.msg:
Stars will fall, and darkness fills the air
Storms will break, bedazzled by our gallant flares!
We shall strike This perilous night Determined to fight
With hope, with song, with dignity!

註：
(1) Stars will fall + Storms will break 互相呼應，一個負面、一個正面
(2) "Air", "Flares" 中 rhyme
(3) "Strike", "Night", "Fight" 中 rhyme
(4) 全部輕重音中哂，短音用preposition，長音用實字，所以鏗鏘有聲
(5) 最後一句差兩個syllables就係 Shakespeare 最鍾意嘅 iambic pentameter，填詞一輕一重就會好有rhythm

Glory enshrined, break our chains! Hold our lines!
Freedom shall rise! Revolution of our Time!
Liberty thrives, rights divine, in our unending strides
Glory be to thee, Hong Kong!

註：
(1) 如樓上巴打講，"enshrined", "lines", "rise", "Time", "thrives", "divine", "strides" ，我係刻意全部 rhyme 哂，亦都係刻意加強 rhyme 嘅次數（老實說，要rhyme哂成首歌都得，但係chorus就唔會覺得特別鏗鏘有聲，冇咗個起承轉合）
(2) 時代革命 "Revolution of our time" 係點都要譯到，otherwise 成首歌冇咗靈魂
(3) "Glory" 一定要擺頭，拉丁文彌撒 / 傳統聖詩 / 神劇 多數都以 "Gloria" 開始，最容易唱 （e.g. Gloria patri, Gloria in excelsis Deo）

(2) "Air", "Flares" 中 rhyme
(3) "Strike", "Night", "Fight" 中 rhyme
(4) 全部輕重音中哂，短音用preposition，長音用實字，所以鏗鏘有聲
(5) 最後一句差兩個syllables就係 Shakespeare 最鍾意嘅 iambic pentameter，填詞一輕一重就會好有rhythm

Glory enshrined, break our chains! Hold our lines!
Freedom shall rise! Revolution of our Time!
Liberty thrives, rights divine, in our unending strides
Glory be to thee, Hong Kong!

註：
(1) 如樓上巴打講，"enshrined", "lines", "rise", "Time", "thrives", "divine", "strides" ，我係刻意全部 rhyme 哂，亦都係刻意加強 rhyme 嘅次數（老實說，要rhyme哂成首歌都得，但係chorus就唔會覺得特別鏗鏘有聲，冇咗個起承轉合）
(2) 時代革命 "Revolution of our time" 係點都要譯到，otherwise 成首歌冇咗靈魂
(3) "Glory" 一定要擺頭，拉丁文彌撒 / 傳統聖詩 / 神劇 多數都以 "Gloria" 開始，最容易唱 （e.g. Gloria patri, Gloria in excelsis Deo）

strike/ (half rhyme with night&fight)

lines/time/strides (half rhyme)

哈哈只係諗個rhyming scheme 會不會有 meaning

多謝一眾巴打欣賞
既然有知音人 我想分享下
最重要係，所有英文字嘅輕重音要同拍字嘅長短度夾
短音用 preposition，長音用實字，所以可以做到鏗鏘有聲
盡量希望做到意譯，唔想冇咗原詞嘅意思

In angst, tears are shed o’er this Land
With rage, fears are crushed, in arms we stand
We rise, undefiled, our voice shall never die
As we yearn, our freedom nighs

註：
(1) "Land", "Stand" / "Die", "Nighs" 中 rhyme
(2) "Tears are shed", "Fears are crushed" 互相呼應，一個負面、一個正面

With eyes blinded, long it comes the night
In faith, banners high, we pledge to fight
Our flesh, sacrificed, our blood shall write this song
Free this Land, “Stand with Hong Kong!”

註：
(1) First stanza "In angst" + "With rage", second stanza 特登將兩個preposition調轉 "With eyes" + "In faith"
(2) "Night", "Fight" / "Song", "Kong" 中 rhyme
(3) "Stand with Hong Kong, Fight for Freedom" 為示威者常用英文口號

昂首 拒默沉 吶喊聲 響透
We rise, undefiled, our voice shall never die
盼自由 歸於 這裡
As we yearn, our freedom nighs

何以 這恐懼 抹不走
With eyes blinded, long it comes the night
何以 為信念 從沒退後
In faith, banners high, we pledge to fight
何解 血在流 但邁進聲 響透
Our flesh, sacrificed, our blood shall write this song
建自由 光輝 香港
Free this Land, “Stand with Hong Kong!”

在 晚星 墜落 徬徨 午夜
Stars will fall, and darkness fills the air
迷霧裡 最遠處 吹 來 號 角 聲
Storms will break, bedazzled by our gallant flares!
捍自由
We shall strike
來齊集這裡
This perilous night
來全力抗對
Determined to fight
勇氣 智慧 也 永不滅
With hope, with song, with dignity!

黎明來到 要光復 這香港
Glory enshrined, break our chains! Hold our lines!
同行兒女 為正義 時代革命
Freedom shall rise! Revolution of our Time!
祈求 民主 與自由 萬世都 不朽
Liberty thrives, rights divine, in our unending strides
我願 榮光 歸香港
Glory be to thee, Hong Kong!
